title: Sentari Teocara
description:
The Temples' Architect
Building and Adventure Modpack with alot of QoL and minimal tech!
body:
![sentari teocara](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6790da7a3086de2fcb55234755c655e7f729ca0e_0.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68ad2b5f1a473c44cf499eb00b2144fdf2231191_0.webp)

invites you to a world where creativity meets exploration. This modpack centers around 
building as its core focus, giving players access to an expansive selection of building mods to design grand temples, detailed structures, and breathtaking landscapes. Whether you're crafting massive architectural masterpieces or intricate interiors, the tools provided will allow endless customization and detail.

However, building is only one part of the adventure. To fuel your creativity, you'll need to venture into the wild to gather resources through exploration and discovery. The modpack introduces a blend of light adventuring elements, encouraging you to explore vast biomes, locate rare materials, and uncover hidden secrets to expand your building arsenal.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50f8a82243c6757a6f935c47b97a6518c765d632_0.webp)

While the modpack minimizes tech mods, it includes OriTech, a simple yet effective mod to streamline resource management without overwhelming the player with complex machinery. Additionally, Quality of Life mods enhance the experience by providing useful features like easier inventory management, better organization, and other improvements that make building and adventuring more efficient and enjoyable.

Whether you're a seasoned architect or a casual builder, Sentari Teocara offers a harmonious balance between creativity, exploration, and resource gathering.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/295aca0fbdecbfcbff995666d4534a298673c99e_0.webp)

A perfect combination for those seeking both an immersive building experience and light adventuring without the clutter of heavy technology.


DISCLAIMER
Allocate atleast 8GB of RAM to this Modpack.
***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
